header.loginTooltip: Sign in to your Sakrylle account
header.pullToReveal: Pull down at top of list to show header

welcome.title: Welcome to Sakrylle Image Studio
welcome.message: Sign in with your Sakrylle account to auto-configure the API and show your balance, no key entry required. You can also skip sign-in and try it out or configure manually.

general.submitModeHint: When Enter submits, use Shift + Enter for a new line. Otherwise Enter inserts a new line.
general.clearInputAfterSubmitHint: When enabled, the prompt and reference images are cleared after a task is created.
general.referenceImageEditActionHint: Controls what happens when you click edit on a reference image without a mask: ask each time, replace the reference, or add a mask.
general.persistInputOnRestartHint: When disabled, prompts and reference images are not persisted; the next launch starts with an empty input.
general.reuseTaskApiProfileTemporarily: Temporarily reuse task API profile when reusing config
general.reuseTaskApiProfileTemporarilyHint: When enabled, reusing a past task temporarily switches to that task's API profile; missing profiles trigger a prompt on submit. When disabled, the current API profile stays active.
general.alwaysShowRetryButton: Show retry button on successful tasks
general.alwaysShowRetryButtonHint: When enabled, the retry button stays visible on task cards and the detail view even after success.
general.agentScrollToBottomAfterSubmitHint: When enabled, Agent mode scrolls to the bottom of the conversation after a successful send.

agent.maxToolRoundsHint: Default 15. Caps consecutive tool calls to prevent infinite loops.
agent.webSearchHintAfter: tool. Each invocation incurs a small fixed-price extra charge.

api.apiProxyHintLocked: This deployment locks the API proxy on; the API URL setting is ignored.
api.apiProxyHint: Auto-enabled when the deployment provides a same-origin proxy; can be turned off. When enabled, it bypasses browser CORS limits and the API URL setting is ignored.
api.sakrylleHint: Once signed in, balance and model list load automatically — no manual API key needed.
api.apiKeyIgnoredWhenOAuth: OAuth token is active. This field will be ignored. To use manual key, create a new profile or logout.
api.apiModeHint: Override via query string: apiMode=images or apiMode=responses.
api.responsesGroupHint: Group used for Agent mode. Switching refreshes your token.
api.modelHintResponses: The Responses API requires a text model that supports the image_generation tool, e.g. {{model}}.
api.modelHintImages: The Images API requires a GPT Image model, e.g. {{model}}.
api.streamImagesHint: When enabled, requests stream — not every provider or gateway supports this. The official endpoint sends no heartbeats while streaming, so partial images are needed to keep the connection alive. Streaming on the official endpoint only supports one image, so multi-image generations are split into concurrent single-image calls.
api.streamPartialImagesHint: Maps to the partial_images parameter (0-3). Setting it to 2 or 3 helps prevent long-running connections from timing out. Each partial image incurs a small extra charge. With 0, no partial images are requested and the connection may drop due to lack of data.
api.imageProfileIdHint: Profile to use for image generation in Agent mode. If specified, switches to that profile and calls Images API. Useful for separate chat/image keys (e.g., GPT-Pro/Plus + GPT-Image).
api.responseFormatB64Hint: When enabled, response_format: b64_json is appended so the API returns Base64 image data instead of a URL. Not all providers or gateways support this.
api.codexCliHint: When enabled, only the parameters Codex CLI actually supports are sent. Override via query string: codexCli=true.
api.copyUrlMessage: Include the API key? If you choose "Exclude", you can also set whether to use New API variables.

data.notice: All configuration, task history, and generated images are stored only in your browser (unless your provider stores them). Export a backup before clearing site data, resetting your browser, or moving to another device.
data.clearConfirmMessage: Clear the selected data? This cannot be undone.

about.intro: This site is built on top of

agent.titleGenerating: Title is generating, cannot rename for now
agent.deleteRoundMessage: Delete this round? This removes the message and its outputs; later messages stay.
agent.deleteMessageMessage: Delete this message? Linked image tasks remain in the gallery.
agent.switchToGalleryMessage: The reused parameters will apply in the gallery input. Your current Agent conversation will be preserved.
agent.startConversationHint: Send a message in the input below to create the first round.

input.agentAutoCount: Agent mode lets the model decide the count from your prompt
input.uploadImageTooltipLimit: Reference image limit reached ({{limit}}); cannot add more
input.compressionDisabledTip: Compression applies only to JPEG and WebP
input.qualityDisabledCodexCli: Codex CLI does not support the quality parameter
input.concurrentSplitTip: Counts above 1 split into concurrent single-image requests
input.removeSomeFirst: Remove some references before adding more
input.referenceAlreadyAdded: This image is already in the references
input.clearAllMessage: Clear the mask base image, {{refCount}} reference images, and the current mask?
input.clearAllTip: Clear mask base, references, and mask
input.editReferenceMessage: Choose what to do this time. Leaving the option below unchecked keeps asking each time; checking it sets a default that you can change in **Settings → Preferences**.
input.editReferenceRemember: Use this choice by default next time
input.scrollHotkeyHint: Release {{key}} to scroll, or drag to the edge for auto-scroll

tasks.pendingHint: The input will be saved once the response completes
tasks.deleteRecordMessage: Delete this record? Linked image resources will also be cleaned up if no other task references them.
tasks.emptyHint: Type a prompt to start generating images

detail.referenceMaybeMore: Picked by the model; may include other images
detail.deleteMessage: Delete this record? Linked image resources will also be cleaned up if no other task references them.

mask.canvasUnsupported: Canvas is not supported in this browser
mask.maskSizeMismatch: Mask size doesn't match the current image
mask.removeMessage: Discard all strokes on this image and remove the mask?
mask.imageMissing: Image not found; mask cannot be edited
mask.draftLoadFailed: Mask draft failed to load; reset to blank: {{error}}
mask.imageResized:
Image resized to meet official mask requirements:
{{originalWidth}}×{{originalHeight}} → {{width}}×{{height}}
mask.title: Edit mask
mask.infoLine1: Per official docs, this feature is prompt-driven and cannot fully control the model's edit region.
mask.infoLine2: Add a hint like "only edit the masked region" to improve instruction following.

size.limitText:
Model constraints round the final output to a valid size:
width and height multiples of 16, max edge 3840px, aspect ratio up to 3:1, total pixels between 655360 and 8294400.
size.title: Image size
size.autoHintLine1: No explicit resolution sent to the model
size.autoHintLine2: The model picks the output size

support.supportLine1: If this tool has been helpful,
support.supportLine2: consider sponsoring the author or sharing feedback.

toast.reuseTempProfile: Temporarily reusing the task's API profile "{{name}}"

errors.waitOrStop: Wait for generation to finish, or stop it first
errors.agentMessageNotFound: The Agent message to regenerate was not found
errors.fullMaskMessage: The mask covers the whole image. The submission may regenerate everything. Continue?
errors.profileNotFoundMessage: API profile "{{taskProfile}}" used by the reused task is missing. Submit using the current profile "{{currentProfile}}"?
errors.needResponsesApiMessage:
The current profile "{{name}}" uses the Images API and only supports image generation, not the conversation needed for Agent mode.

Switch this profile to Responses API, or create / pick a profile that uses Responses API.
errors.providerNotSupportAgentTitle: Profile does not support Agent mode
errors.providerNotSupportAgentMessage:
The provider for "{{name}}" doesn't currently support Agent mode. Agent mode requires an OpenAI profile using the Responses API.

Go to API settings and pick or create a profile that uses Responses API.
errors.codexCliMessage:
{{reason}}; the API source is likely Codex CLI.

Enable Codex CLI compatibility? It disables the unsupported quality parameter, splits multi-image Images API requests into concurrent calls (Codex CLI ignores the count parameter), and prepends a short "don't rewrite" instruction to keep the prompt intact.
errors.codexCliReasonMissing: The API didn't return some fields the official API normally returns
errors.agentStreamNoBody: API returned no readable streaming response
errors.agentStreamInvalidJson: Agent stream contained an unparsable JSON event
errors.agentStreamNoFinal: Agent stream did not return a final response
errors.imagesStreamNoBody: API returned no readable streaming response
errors.imagesStreamInvalidJson: Stream contained an unparsable JSON event
errors.imagesStreamNoFinal: Stream did not return a final image
errors.imagesStreamNoUsable: Stream did not return a usable image
errors.noImagePayload: API returned no image data; check the raw response to see the actual payload structure.
errors.unrecognizedImagePayload: API returned no recognizable image data; check the raw response to see the actual payload structure.
errors.streamingNoImage: Stream did not return an image
errors.missingProfileForTask: API profile used by this task is missing.
errors.noImagesProfile: Gallery mode requires an Images API profile. Please create a profile with apiMode=images in settings.
errors.agentMissingImagesProfile: Sakrylle Agent image generation requires a separate Images API profile. Create a GPT-Image profile in settings, then select it in the current Responses profile's Agent mode image generation profile field.
errors.imageInputTooLarge: Image input payload too large: {{actual}}; max {{limit}}
errors.imageDownloadCors: Image was generated, but the provider blocked cross-origin downloads.{{hint}}
errors.imageDownloadFailed: Image link download failed (cross-origin, expired link, or network).{{hint}}
errors.imageFetchCorsHint: Use the link button to copy the result link, or enable "Return Base64 image data" to avoid this.
errors.maskSizeMismatch: Mask size doesn't match the base image; redraw the mask
errors.maskTargetMissing: Mask base image is missing; pick a mask region again
errors.paintMaskFirst: Paint the region you want to edit first
errors.oauthMissingVerifier: PKCE verifier missing; sign in again

profile.jsonMarkdownLink: JSON contains a Markdown link — please paste plain text

errors.clipboardEmbedded: Copy failed: clipboard permission denied for embedded page
errors.clipboardUnsupported: This browser doesn't support image clipboard write
errors.openaiTimeout: Request timed out: more than {{seconds}} seconds elapsed. Retry or raise the timeout.{{hint}}
errors.timeoutHintStreaming: You can also enable "Streaming" and raise "Partial image count" to keep the connection alive.
errors.timeoutHintPartialZero: The official streaming endpoint sends no heartbeats. "Partial image count" is 0, so the connection may drop. Try 2 or 3.
errors.timeoutHintPartialLow: You can also raise "Partial image count" to keep the connection alive during long runs.
errors.networkProxyImmediate: Hint: request failed immediately. Check that the API proxy service is running.
errors.networkProxyTimeout60: Hint: connection cut off around 60s. This is typically the Nginx default; raise proxy_read_timeout, or lower image size/quality.{{hint}}
errors.networkProxyTimeout120: Hint: connection cut off around 120s. Typical of a Cloudflare/CDN gateway timeout, not the API itself. Consider upgrading the plan or bypassing the CDN.{{hint}}
errors.networkProxyTimeoutOther: Hint: connection cut off after a long wait. Likely a reverse proxy or gateway timeout, not the API. Check proxy timeouts or lower image size/quality.{{hint}}
errors.agentRoundLimitNotice: Reached the max tool call count ({{max}}); auto continuation stopped.

contextMenu.referenceLimitReached: Reference image limit reached ({{limit}}); cannot add more

settingsApiUrlExtras.proxyEnabledNote: Proxy is on; the request target is decided by the deployment, and this setting is ignored.
settingsApiUrlExtras.falDefaultSuffix: ; a custom value is used as the fal.ai proxy URL.

docker.title: Docker deployment config update
docker.message:
This release splits the Docker `API_URL` env var into `DEFAULT_API_URL` and `API_PROXY_URL`.

`DEFAULT_API_URL` is only the default API address shown in the frontend settings. `API_PROXY_URL` is only the upstream target for Nginx in the container.

To prevent breakage on upgrade, the legacy `API_URL` is still used as a fallback for both. Update your docker run / docker-compose configs to use the new variables explicitly.
